jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at upGrad
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? upGrad in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About upGrad:
upGrad is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with upGrad!
